rulings.Rulings: continued to january 15, 2020 (first available date). new notice must be mailed as the Notice of Hearing form must contain the mandatory language in Probate Code section 851(c). in addition, a copy of the petition must be served on every party along with the new Notice of Hearing form and a full file stamped copy of the petiiton must be provided to the examiner in Room 202 (not just the first page, and the copy must be single-sided). new notice must be mailed no later than 12/16/19, with the new proof of service filed and courtesy copy provided no later than noon on 1/8/20.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF TERRENCE HAROLD HULL
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 12/10/19. Notes faxed 11/22/19 to (925) 648-2045 A proposed nonresident personal representative will be required to post a bond to protect creditors, even if the will waives, or all heirs waive, bond. A declaration or attachment to the petition setting forth in detail the anticipated liabilities of the decedent and claims against the estate will be used by the Court to determine the amount of the bond, but in no event will the bond be less than $20,000. (LRSF 14.37).
